---
title: "Volcano-Spatial"
author: "Kanako Terakawa"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r Figure 2B Volcano_Plot}
#   - Universal-design palette (CVD-safe)
#   - built from any DEG CSV (all_results)
#   - labels the top N up- and down-regulated genes
#   - reusable for Susztak DKD (Fig 2B), KPMP DKD (Fig 3A), and HKD

library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(dplyr)
library(scales)

# build a volcano plot from an all-genes CSV
create_volcano_plot <- function(csv_path,
                                output_dir,
                                filename_base,
                                title_text     = "Volcano plot",
                                fdr_threshold  = 0.05,
                                label_top_n    = 10,        # top N to label (each of up/down)
                                label_lfc_min  = 0.5,       # minimum |logFC| to be a label candidate
                                xlim_range     = NULL,      # NULL = auto
                                ylim_range     = NULL) {
  
  # Load and reshape
  df <- read.csv(csv_path, row.names = 1)
  df$gene <- rownames(df)
  df$neg_log10_FDR <- -log10(df$FDR)
  
  # direction label
  df$direction <- "ns"
  df$direction[df$FDR < fdr_threshold & df$logFC > 0] <- "up"
  df$direction[df$FDR < fdr_threshold & df$logFC < 0] <- "down"
  df$direction <- factor(df$direction, levels = c("ns", "up", "down"))
  
  n_up   <- sum(df$direction == "up")
  n_down <- sum(df$direction == "down")
  
  cat("Volcano plot:\n")
  cat("  Total genes :", nrow(df),    "\n")
  cat("  Up   (FDR<", fdr_threshold, "):", n_up,   "\n")
  cat("  Down (FDR<", fdr_threshold, "):", n_down, "\n")
  
  # Select genes to label
  top_up <- df %>%
    dplyr::filter(direction == "up", abs(logFC) >= label_lfc_min) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(logFC)) %>%
    dplyr::slice_head(n = label_top_n)
  
  top_down <- df %>%
    dplyr::filter(direction == "down", abs(logFC) >= label_lfc_min) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(logFC) %>%
    dplyr::slice_head(n = label_top_n)
  
  labeled_genes <- dplyr::bind_rows(top_up, top_down)
  
  cat("  Labeled genes:", nrow(labeled_genes), "\n")
  
  # Axis range
  if (is.null(xlim_range)) {
    xlim_range <- max(abs(df$logFC), na.rm = TRUE) * 1.05 * c(-1, 1)
  }
  if (is.null(ylim_range)) {
    ylim_range <- c(0, max(df$neg_log10_FDR, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.05)
  }
  
  # Color palette (Okabe-Ito, CVD-safe)
  vol_cols <- c(
    "ns"   = "#BBBBBB",   # light gray
    "up"   = "#D55E00",   # vermillion (matched to high-coupling)
    "down" = "#0072B2"    # blue
  )
  
  # Plot
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = logFC, y = neg_log10_FDR)) +
    
    # threshold lines
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(fdr_threshold),
               linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50", linewidth = 0.4) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0,
               linetype = "solid", color = "gray70", linewidth = 0.4) +
    
    # ns spots first (drawn behind)
    geom_point(data = df %>% dplyr::filter(direction == "ns"),
               aes(color = direction),
               alpha = 0.4, size = 1.3) +
    
    # significant spots after (drawn in front)
    geom_point(data = df %>% dplyr::filter(direction != "ns"),
               aes(color = direction),
               alpha = 0.85, size = 1.8) +
    
    # labels
    geom_text_repel(
      data    = labeled_genes,
      aes(label = gene, color = direction),
      size           = 3.2,
      fontface       = "italic",
      box.padding    = 0.4,
      point.padding  = 0.2,
      max.overlaps   = Inf,
      segment.size   = 0.3,
      segment.alpha  = 0.5,
      show.legend    = FALSE,
      seed           = 42
    ) +
    
    scale_color_manual(
      values = vol_cols,
      labels = c("ns"   = sprintf("ns (n=%d)",   sum(df$direction == "ns")),
                 "up"   = sprintf("Up (n=%d)",   n_up),
                 "down" = sprintf("Down (n=%d)", n_down)),
      breaks = c("up", "down", "ns")
    ) +
    
    scale_x_continuous(limits = xlim_range,
                       expand = expansion(mult = 0.02)) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = ylim_range,
                       expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) +
    
    labs(
      title = title_text,
      x     = expression(Log[2]~Fold~Change~(High*"-"*coupling~vs~Reference)),
      y     = expression(-Log[10]~FDR),
      color = NULL
    ) +
    
    theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      plot.title          = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13, hjust = 0),
      axis.title          = element_text(size = 11),
      axis.text           = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
      legend.position     = "none",
      panel.grid.major    = element_line(color = "gray95", linewidth = 0.3),
      panel.grid.minor    = element_blank()
    )
  
  # Save
  dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  
  pdf_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(filename_base, ".pdf"))
  png_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(filename_base, ".png"))
  
  ggsave(pdf_path, p, width = 7, height = 6, units = "in", device = cairo_pdf)
  ggsave(png_path, p, width = 7, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)
  
  cat("Saved PDF:", pdf_path, "\n")
  cat("Saved PNG:", png_path, "\n")
  
  return(p)
}

# Examples

# ---- Fig 2B: Susztak DKD Proof-of-Concept ----
p_susztak <- create_volcano_plot(
  csv_path      = "/path/to/KPMP_DKD_ST_project/analysis_for_paper/Susztak/EdgeR_HighCoupling_vs_Reference_all_DKDonly_20260512_170847.csv",
  output_dir    = "/path/to/KPMP_DKD_ST_project/figures_for_paper/Volcano/",
  filename_base = "Figure_2B_Volcano_Susztak_DKD",
  title_text    = "Proof-of-Concept Cohort (n = 3 paired samples)",
  label_top_n   = 10,
  label_lfc_min = 0.5
)
print(p_susztak)
```


```{r Figure 4A Volcano_Plot}
### Y-axis cap because DES is an outlier

create_volcano_plot <- function(csv_path,
                                output_dir,
                                filename_base,
                                title_text     = "Volcano plot",
                                fdr_threshold  = 0.05,
                                label_top_n    = 10,
                                label_lfc_min  = 0.5,
                                xlim_range     = NULL,
                                ylim_range     = NULL,
                                y_cap          = NULL) {   # new

  # Load and reshape
  df <- read.csv(csv_path, row.names = 1)
  df$gene <- rownames(df)
  df$neg_log10_FDR <- -log10(df$FDR)

  # ---------- 1b. y-axis capping ----------
  if (!is.null(y_cap)) {
    df$is_capped <- df$neg_log10_FDR > y_cap
    df$y_plot    <- pmin(df$neg_log10_FDR, y_cap)
    cat("  y-axis capped at:", y_cap,
        "( capped points:", sum(df$is_capped), ")\n")
  } else {
    df$is_capped <- FALSE
    df$y_plot    <- df$neg_log10_FDR
  }

  # Direction label: all genes with FDR < 0.05 colored up/down
  df$direction <- "ns"
  df$direction[df$FDR < fdr_threshold & df$logFC > 0] <- "up"
  df$direction[df$FDR < fdr_threshold & df$logFC < 0] <- "down"
  df$direction <- factor(df$direction, levels = c("ns", "up", "down"))

  n_up   <- sum(df$direction == "up")
  n_down <- sum(df$direction == "down")

  cat("Volcano plot:\n")
  cat("  Total genes :", nrow(df),    "\n")
  cat("  Up   (FDR<", fdr_threshold, "):", n_up,   "\n")
  cat("  Down (FDR<", fdr_threshold, "):", n_down, "\n")

  # Select genes to label
  top_up <- df %>%
    dplyr::filter(direction == "up", abs(logFC) >= label_lfc_min) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(logFC)) %>%
    dplyr::slice_head(n = label_top_n)

  top_down <- df %>%
    dplyr::filter(direction == "down", abs(logFC) >= label_lfc_min) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(logFC) %>%
    dplyr::slice_head(n = label_top_n)

  labeled_genes <- dplyr::bind_rows(top_up, top_down)

  # Axis range
  if (is.null(xlim_range)) {
    xlim_range <- max(abs(df$logFC), na.rm = TRUE) * 1.05 * c(-1, 1)
  }
  if (is.null(ylim_range)) {
    y_max     <- if (!is.null(y_cap)) y_cap else max(df$neg_log10_FDR, na.rm = TRUE)
    ylim_range <- c(0, y_max * 1.08)        # headroom for the triangle marker
  }

  # Colors
  vol_cols <- c(
    "ns"   = "#BBBBBB",
    "up"   = "#D55E00",
    "down" = "#0072B2"
  )

  # Plot
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = logFC, y = y_plot)) +     # y_plot

    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(fdr_threshold),
               linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50", linewidth = 0.4) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0,
               linetype = "solid", color = "gray70", linewidth = 0.4) +

    # NS (background)
    geom_point(data = df %>% dplyr::filter(direction == "ns"),
               aes(color = direction),
               alpha = 0.4, size = 1.3) +

    # significant, normal position (circle)
    geom_point(data = df %>% dplyr::filter(direction != "ns", !is_capped),
               aes(color = direction),
               alpha = 0.85, size = 1.8) +

    # significant, capped (triangle, off-scale)        # new
    geom_point(data = df %>% dplyr::filter(direction != "ns", is_capped),
               aes(color = direction),
               alpha = 0.9, size = 3.0, shape = 17) +

  geom_text_repel(
    data    = labeled_genes,
    aes(label = gene, color = direction),
    size               = 3.2,
    fontface           = "italic",
    bg.color           = "white",   # white halo around text
    bg.r               = 0.15,      # halo thickness (0.1-0.2)
    box.padding        = 0.8,       # increased 0.4 -> 0.8
    point.padding      = 0.5,       # increased 0.2 -> 0.5
    force              = 3,         # stronger repulsion (default 1)
    force_pull         = 0.5,       # weaker pull back to original position
    min.segment.length = 0,         # always draw the segment line
    max.overlaps       = Inf,
    segment.size       = 0.3,
    segment.alpha      = 0.5,
    show.legend        = FALSE,
    seed               = 42,
    max.iter           = 10000      # more placement-optimization iterations
  ) +

    scale_color_manual(values = vol_cols, breaks = c("up", "down", "ns")) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = xlim_range, expand = expansion(mult = 0.02)) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = ylim_range, expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) +

    labs(
      title = title_text,
      x     = expression(Log[2]~Fold~Change~(High*"-"*coupling~vs~Reference)),
      y     = expression(-Log[10]~FDR),
      color = NULL
    ) +

    theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13, hjust = 0),
      axis.title       = element_text(size = 11),
      axis.text        = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
      legend.position  = "none",
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "gray95", linewidth = 0.3),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
    )

  # Save
  dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  pdf_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(filename_base, ".pdf"))
  png_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(filename_base, ".png"))
  ggsave(pdf_path, p, width = 7, height = 6, units = "in", device = cairo_pdf)
  ggsave(png_path, p, width = 7, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)

  return(p)
}

p_kpmp_dkd <- create_volcano_plot(
  csv_path      = "/path/to/KPMP_DKD_ST_project/analysis_for_paper/KPMP/DKD/EdgeR_HighCoupling_vs_Reference_all_20260512_124736.csv",
  output_dir    = "/path/to/KPMP_DKD_ST_project/figures_for_paper/Volcano/",
  filename_base = "Figure_4A_Volcano_KPMP_DKD",
  title_text    = "KPMP DKD Cohort (n = 14 paired samples)",
  label_top_n   = 5,
  y_cap         = 8.5      # added
)

print(p_kpmp_dkd)
```




```{r Figure_4_KPMP_DKD_Spatial_v8}
# Figure 4: KPMP DKD Spatial Plot v8
#   - VisiumV2 support (x/y swap)
#   - auto rescale (fullres -> lowres)
#   - DOT_SIZE = 2.0 (dense spots)

library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)
library(viridis)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(grid)
library(abind)

# settings
SEURAT_OBJ <- merged_seurat       # KPMP DKD object

valid_samples <- c(
  "X29.10404", "X29.10408", "X27.10039", "X31.10081", "X29.10423",
  "X27.10094", "X29.10394", "X27.10157", "X28.12265.C", "X29.10439",
  "X29.10405", "X29.10282", "X28.12265.M", "X29.10016"
)

out_dir <- "/path/to/KPMP_DKD_ST_project/figures_for_paper/Spatial Plot/KPMP_DKD/"

HE_ALPHA     <- 0.4
DOT_SIZE     <- 2.0  
GWR_COEF_CAP <- 5

dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# v8: VisiumV2 x/y swap + auto-rescale
get_coords_std <- function(obj, img_name) {
  coords_raw <- GetTissueCoordinates(obj, image = img_name)
  
  if ("cell" %in% colnames(coords_raw)) {
    # VisiumV2: x = pixel_row (vertical), y = pixel_col (horizontal) -> SWAP
    coords <- data.frame(
      Barcode  = coords_raw$cell,
      imagecol = coords_raw$y,    # y is horizontal
      imagerow = coords_raw$x,    # x is vertical
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  } else {
    # VisiumV1: as-is
    coords <- data.frame(
      Barcode  = rownames(coords_raw),
      imagecol = coords_raw$imagecol,
      imagerow = coords_raw$imagerow,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }
  
  # auto scaling (fullres -> lowres)
  img_array <- obj@images[[img_name]]@image
  if (!is.null(img_array)) {
    img_w <- dim(img_array)[2]
    max_col <- max(coords$imagecol, na.rm = TRUE)
    
    if (max_col > img_w * 1.5) {
      sf <- obj@images[[img_name]]@scale.factors
      scale_factor <- if (!is.null(sf$lowres)) sf$lowres else img_w / max_col * 0.95
      coords$imagecol <- coords$imagecol * scale_factor
      coords$imagerow <- coords$imagerow * scale_factor
      cat("    [Auto-rescale: ×", round(scale_factor, 4), "]\n", sep = "")
    }
  }
  coords
}

# Image -> Sample lookup
img_sample_map <- data.frame(
  image  = Images(SEURAT_OBJ),
  sample = sapply(Images(SEURAT_OBJ), function(img) {
    coords_raw <- GetTissueCoordinates(SEURAT_OBJ, image = img)
    barcodes <- if ("cell" %in% colnames(coords_raw)) coords_raw$cell else rownames(coords_raw)
    unique(SEURAT_OBJ$orig.ident[colnames(SEURAT_OBJ) %in% barcodes])[1]
  }),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Spot_Label
SEURAT_OBJ$Spot_Label <- ifelse(
  !is.na(SEURAT_OBJ$M2_Coeff) & SEURAT_OBJ$M2_Coeff > 0 & SEURAT_OBJ$M2_AdjP < 0.05,
  "High-coupling", "Reference"
)
SEURAT_OBJ$Spot_Label[is.na(SEURAT_OBJ$M2_Coeff)] <- "NA"
SEURAT_OBJ$Spot_Label <- factor(SEURAT_OBJ$Spot_Label,
                                levels = c("High-coupling", "Reference", "NA"))

# palette
m2_palette  <- function(n = 100) viridis::rocket(n, begin = 0.15, end = 0.95, direction = -1)
fib_palette <- function(n = 100) viridis::mako  (n, begin = 0.15, end = 0.95, direction = -1)
gwr_diverging <- c("#08519C", "#4292C6", "#9ECAE1",
                   "#FFEDA0",
                   "#FEB24C", "#FD8D3C", "#E31A1C")
hc_cols <- c("High-coupling" = "#D55E00",
             "Reference"     = "#666666",
             "NA"            = "#DDDDDD")

# H&E layer
get_HE_layer <- function(obj, img_name, alpha = HE_ALPHA) {
  img_array <- obj@images[[img_name]]@image
  if (is.null(img_array)) return(NULL)
  if (length(dim(img_array)) == 3 && dim(img_array)[3] == 3) {
    alpha_layer <- array(alpha, dim = c(dim(img_array)[1], dim(img_array)[2], 1))
    img_array <- abind::abind(img_array, alpha_layer, along = 3)
  }
  list(grob = grid::rasterGrob(img_array, interpolate = TRUE),
       height = dim(img_array)[1], width = dim(img_array)[2])
}

# Panel function
make_panel <- function(coords_s, HE_info, feature, palette_fn, lim,
                       title, color_label, oob_method = scales::squish) {
  p <- ggplot(coords_s,
              aes(x = imagecol, y = -imagerow, color = .data[[feature]]))
  if (!is.null(HE_info)) {
    p <- p + annotation_custom(HE_info$grob,
                               xmin = 0, xmax = HE_info$width,
                               ymin = -HE_info$height, ymax = 0)
  }
  p +
    geom_point(size = DOT_SIZE, alpha = 0.9) +
    scale_color_gradientn(colors = palette_fn, limits = lim,
                          oob = oob_method, na.value = "#DDDDDD") +
    labs(title = title, color = color_label) +
    coord_fixed() + theme_void() +
    theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
          plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 12),
          legend.position = "right",
          legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
          legend.text  = element_text(size = 9),
          legend.key.height = unit(0.5, "cm"))
}

# Main loop
cat("============================================================\n")
cat("KPMP DKD cohort - Processing", length(valid_samples), "samples\n")
cat("============================================================\n")

for (target_sample in valid_samples) {
  cat("\nGenerating:", target_sample, "\n")
  img <- img_sample_map$image[img_sample_map$sample == target_sample]
  if (length(img) == 0) { cat("  No image - skipping\n"); next }
  img <- img[1]
  
  HE_info <- get_HE_layer(SEURAT_OBJ, img, alpha = HE_ALPHA)
  
  coords_s <- get_coords_std(SEURAT_OBJ, img) %>%
    left_join(SEURAT_OBJ@meta.data %>%
                rownames_to_column("Barcode") %>%
                dplyr::select(Barcode, M2Mac_fraction, Fibrosis_Score,
                              M2_Coeff, Spot_Label),
              by = "Barcode")
  
  n_hc <- sum(coords_s$Spot_Label == "High-coupling", na.rm = TRUE)
  cat("  Spots:", nrow(coords_s), "  HC spots:", n_hc, "\n")
  
  m2_vals <- coords_s$M2Mac_fraction[!is.na(coords_s$M2Mac_fraction)]
  m2_lim_hi <- if (length(m2_vals) > 0) quantile(m2_vals, 0.90) else 1
  if (m2_lim_hi <= 0) m2_lim_hi <- max(m2_vals, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (m2_lim_hi <= 0) m2_lim_hi <- 1e-6
  
  fib_vals <- coords_s$Fibrosis_Score[!is.na(coords_s$Fibrosis_Score)]
  fib_lim_lo <- quantile(fib_vals, 0.10)
  fib_lim_hi <- quantile(fib_vals, 0.90)
  
  pA <- make_panel(coords_s, HE_info, "M2Mac_fraction",
                   m2_palette(100), c(0, m2_lim_hi),
                   paste0("M2 Macrophage Score (0~", round(m2_lim_hi, 3), ")"),
                   "M2Mac")
  pB <- make_panel(coords_s, HE_info, "Fibrosis_Score",
                   fib_palette(100), c(fib_lim_lo, fib_lim_hi),
                   paste0("Fibrosis Score (", round(fib_lim_lo, 2),
                          "~", round(fib_lim_hi, 2), ")"),
                   "Fibrosis")
  pC <- make_panel(coords_s, HE_info, "M2_Coeff",
                   gwr_diverging, c(-GWR_COEF_CAP, GWR_COEF_CAP),
                   paste0("GWR Coefficient (±", GWR_COEF_CAP, ")"),
                   "Coeff")
  
  coords_ordered <- coords_s %>% arrange(Spot_Label == "High-coupling")
  pD <- ggplot(coords_ordered,
               aes(x = imagecol, y = -imagerow, color = Spot_Label))
  if (!is.null(HE_info)) {
    pD <- pD + annotation_custom(HE_info$grob,
                                  xmin = 0, xmax = HE_info$width,
                                  ymin = -HE_info$height, ymax = 0)
  }
  pD <- pD +
    geom_point(size = DOT_SIZE, alpha = 0.95) +
    scale_color_manual(values = hc_cols, na.value = "#DDDDDD", drop = FALSE) +
    labs(title = paste0("High-Coupling Spots (n=", n_hc, ")"), color = NULL) +
    coord_fixed() + theme_void() +
    theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
          plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 12),
          legend.position = "right")
  
  fig_map <- (pA | pB) / (pC | pD) +
    plot_annotation(title = target_sample,
                    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5,
                                                            face = "bold", size = 16)))
  print(fig_map)
  
  file_base <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("Spatial_4panel_", target_sample, "_0514"))
  ggsave(paste0(file_base, ".pdf"), fig_map,
         width = 14, height = 13, units = "in", device = cairo_pdf)
  ggsave(paste0(file_base, ".png"), fig_map,
         width = 14, height = 13, units = "in", dpi = 300)
  cat("  ✓ Saved:", file_base, "\n")
}

cat("\nDone. KPMP DKD cohort.\n")
cat("Saved in:", out_dir, "\n")
```


```{r **Figure_5_KPMP_HKD_Spatial_v8_FIXROTATION**}
# Figure 5: KPMP HKD Spatial Plot v8 (rotation-corrected)
#   - adds VisiumV2 x/y swap to v7
#   - VisiumV2: x = pixel_row (vertical), y = pixel_col (horizontal)

library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)
library(viridis)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(grid)
library(abind)

# settings
SEURAT_OBJ <- merged_hkd

valid_samples <- c(
  "X31.10063", "X31.10221", "X31.10336",
  "X28.12518", "X29.10410", "X28.12613",
  "X31.10090", "X29.10400", "X31.10219"
)

out_dir <- "/path/to/KPMP_DKD_ST_project/figures_for_paper/Spatial Plot/KPMP_HKD/"

HE_ALPHA     <- 0.4
DOT_SIZE     <- 2.0    
GWR_COEF_CAP <- 5

dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# v8: x/y swap support
get_coords_std <- function(obj, img_name) {
  coords_raw <- GetTissueCoordinates(obj, image = img_name)
  
  if ("cell" %in% colnames(coords_raw)) {
    # VisiumV2: x = pixel_row (vertical), y = pixel_col (horizontal) -> SWAP
    coords <- data.frame(
      Barcode  = coords_raw$cell,
      imagecol = coords_raw$y,    # y is horizontal
      imagerow = coords_raw$x,    # x is vertical
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  } else {
    # VisiumV1: as-is
    coords <- data.frame(
      Barcode  = rownames(coords_raw),
      imagecol = coords_raw$imagecol,
      imagerow = coords_raw$imagerow,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }
  
  # auto scaling
  img_array <- obj@images[[img_name]]@image
  if (!is.null(img_array)) {
    img_w <- dim(img_array)[2]
    max_col <- max(coords$imagecol, na.rm = TRUE)
    
    if (max_col > img_w * 1.5) {
      sf <- obj@images[[img_name]]@scale.factors
      scale_factor <- if (!is.null(sf$lowres)) sf$lowres else img_w / max_col * 0.95
      coords$imagecol <- coords$imagecol * scale_factor
      coords$imagerow <- coords$imagerow * scale_factor
      cat("    [Auto-rescale: ×", round(scale_factor, 4), "]\n", sep = "")
    }
  }
  coords
}

# Image -> Sample lookup
img_sample_map <- data.frame(
  image  = Images(SEURAT_OBJ),
  sample = sapply(Images(SEURAT_OBJ), function(img) {
    coords_raw <- GetTissueCoordinates(SEURAT_OBJ, image = img)
    barcodes <- if ("cell" %in% colnames(coords_raw)) coords_raw$cell else rownames(coords_raw)
    unique(SEURAT_OBJ$orig.ident[colnames(SEURAT_OBJ) %in% barcodes])[1]
  }),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Spot_Label
SEURAT_OBJ$Spot_Label <- ifelse(
  !is.na(SEURAT_OBJ$M2_Coeff) & SEURAT_OBJ$M2_Coeff > 0 & SEURAT_OBJ$M2_AdjP < 0.05,
  "High-coupling", "Reference"
)
SEURAT_OBJ$Spot_Label[is.na(SEURAT_OBJ$M2_Coeff)] <- "NA"
SEURAT_OBJ$Spot_Label <- factor(SEURAT_OBJ$Spot_Label,
                                levels = c("High-coupling", "Reference", "NA"))

# palette
m2_palette  <- function(n = 100) viridis::rocket(n, begin = 0.15, end = 0.95, direction = -1)
fib_palette <- function(n = 100) viridis::mako  (n, begin = 0.15, end = 0.95, direction = -1)
gwr_diverging <- c("#08519C", "#4292C6", "#9ECAE1",
                   "#FFEDA0",
                   "#FEB24C", "#FD8D3C", "#E31A1C")
hc_cols <- c("High-coupling" = "#D55E00",
             "Reference"     = "#666666",
             "NA"            = "#DDDDDD")

# H&E layer
get_HE_layer <- function(obj, img_name, alpha = HE_ALPHA) {
  img_array <- obj@images[[img_name]]@image
  if (is.null(img_array)) return(NULL)
  if (length(dim(img_array)) == 3 && dim(img_array)[3] == 3) {
    alpha_layer <- array(alpha, dim = c(dim(img_array)[1], dim(img_array)[2], 1))
    img_array <- abind::abind(img_array, alpha_layer, along = 3)
  }
  list(grob = grid::rasterGrob(img_array, interpolate = TRUE),
       height = dim(img_array)[1], width = dim(img_array)[2])
}

# Panel function
make_panel <- function(coords_s, HE_info, feature, palette_fn, lim,
                       title, color_label, oob_method = scales::squish) {
  p <- ggplot(coords_s,
              aes(x = imagecol, y = -imagerow, color = .data[[feature]]))
  if (!is.null(HE_info)) {
    p <- p + annotation_custom(HE_info$grob,
                               xmin = 0, xmax = HE_info$width,
                               ymin = -HE_info$height, ymax = 0)
  }
  p +
    geom_point(size = DOT_SIZE, alpha = 0.9) +
    scale_color_gradientn(colors = palette_fn, limits = lim,
                          oob = oob_method, na.value = "#DDDDDD") +
    labs(title = title, color = color_label) +
    coord_fixed() + theme_void() +
    theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
          plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 12),
          legend.position = "right",
          legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
          legend.text  = element_text(size = 9),
          legend.key.height = unit(0.5, "cm"))
}

# Main loop (test with X29.10400 first)
for (target_sample in valid_samples) {
  cat("\nGenerating:", target_sample, "\n")
  img <- img_sample_map$image[img_sample_map$sample == target_sample]
  if (length(img) == 0) { cat("  No image - skipping\n"); next }
  img <- img[1]
  
  HE_info <- get_HE_layer(SEURAT_OBJ, img, alpha = HE_ALPHA)
  
  coords_s <- get_coords_std(SEURAT_OBJ, img) %>%
    left_join(SEURAT_OBJ@meta.data %>%
                rownames_to_column("Barcode") %>%
                dplyr::select(Barcode, M2Mac_fraction, Fibrosis_Score,
                              M2_Coeff, Spot_Label),
              by = "Barcode")
  
  n_hc <- sum(coords_s$Spot_Label == "High-coupling", na.rm = TRUE)
  
  m2_vals <- coords_s$M2Mac_fraction[!is.na(coords_s$M2Mac_fraction)]
  m2_lim_hi <- if (length(m2_vals) > 0) quantile(m2_vals, 0.90) else 1
  if (m2_lim_hi <= 0) m2_lim_hi <- max(m2_vals, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (m2_lim_hi <= 0) m2_lim_hi <- 1e-6
  
  fib_vals <- coords_s$Fibrosis_Score[!is.na(coords_s$Fibrosis_Score)]
  fib_lim_lo <- quantile(fib_vals, 0.10)
  fib_lim_hi <- quantile(fib_vals, 0.90)
  
  pA <- make_panel(coords_s, HE_info, "M2Mac_fraction",
                   m2_palette(100), c(0, m2_lim_hi),
                   paste0("M2 Macrophage Score (0~", round(m2_lim_hi, 3), ")"),
                   "M2Mac")
  pB <- make_panel(coords_s, HE_info, "Fibrosis_Score",
                   fib_palette(100), c(fib_lim_lo, fib_lim_hi),
                   paste0("Fibrosis Score (", round(fib_lim_lo, 2),
                          "~", round(fib_lim_hi, 2), ")"),
                   "Fibrosis")
  pC <- make_panel(coords_s, HE_info, "M2_Coeff",
                   gwr_diverging, c(-GWR_COEF_CAP, GWR_COEF_CAP),
                   paste0("GWR Coefficient (±", GWR_COEF_CAP, ")"),
                   "Coeff")
  
  coords_ordered <- coords_s %>% arrange(Spot_Label == "High-coupling")
  pD <- ggplot(coords_ordered,
               aes(x = imagecol, y = -imagerow, color = Spot_Label))
  if (!is.null(HE_info)) {
    pD <- pD + annotation_custom(HE_info$grob,
                                  xmin = 0, xmax = HE_info$width,
                                  ymin = -HE_info$height, ymax = 0)
  }
  pD <- pD +
    geom_point(size = DOT_SIZE, alpha = 0.95) +
    scale_color_manual(values = hc_cols, na.value = "#DDDDDD", drop = FALSE) +
    labs(title = paste0("High-Coupling Spots (n=", n_hc, ")"), color = NULL) +
    coord_fixed() + theme_void() +
    theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
          plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 12),
          legend.position = "right")
  
  fig_map <- (pA | pB) / (pC | pD) +
    plot_annotation(title = target_sample,
                    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5,
                                                            face = "bold", size = 16)))
  print(fig_map)
  
  file_base <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("Spatial_4panel_", target_sample, "_v8"))
  ggsave(paste0(file_base, ".pdf"), fig_map,
         width = 14, height = 13, units = "in", device = cairo_pdf)
  ggsave(paste0(file_base, ".png"), fig_map,
         width = 14, height = 13, units = "in", dpi = 300)
  cat("  ✓ Saved:", file_base, "\n")
}
```


```{r KPMP DKD Spatial Plot}
# Figure 4: KPMP DKD Spatial Plot
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)
library(viridis)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(grid)
library(abind)

# Settings
SEURAT_OBJ <- merged_seurat       # KPMP DKD object

valid_samples <- c(
  "X29.10404", "X29.10408", "X27.10039", "X31.10081", "X29.10423",
  "X27.10094", "X29.10394", "X27.10157", "X28.12265.C", "X29.10439",
  "X29.10405", "X29.10282", "X28.12265.M", "X29.10016"
)

out_dir <- "/path/to/KPMP_DKD_ST_project/figures_for_paper/Spatial Plot/KPMP_DKD/"

HE_ALPHA          <- 0.4
DOT_SIZE          <- 2.0
GWR_COEF_CAP      <- 5
ASPECT_THRESHOLD  <- 1.5

dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# VisiumV2 x/y swap + auto-rescale
get_coords_std <- function(obj, img_name) {
  coords_raw <- GetTissueCoordinates(obj, image = img_name)
  
  if ("cell" %in% colnames(coords_raw)) {
    coords <- data.frame(
      Barcode  = coords_raw$cell,
      imagecol = coords_raw$y,
      imagerow = coords_raw$x,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  } else {
    coords <- data.frame(
      Barcode  = rownames(coords_raw),
      imagecol = coords_raw$imagecol,
      imagerow = coords_raw$imagerow,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }
  
  img_array <- obj@images[[img_name]]@image
  if (!is.null(img_array)) {
    img_w   <- dim(img_array)[2]
    max_col <- max(coords$imagecol, na.rm = TRUE)
    if (max_col > img_w * 1.5) {
      sf <- obj@images[[img_name]]@scale.factors
      scale_factor <- if (!is.null(sf$lowres)) sf$lowres else img_w / max_col * 0.95
      coords$imagecol <- coords$imagecol * scale_factor
      coords$imagerow <- coords$imagerow * scale_factor
      cat("    [Auto-rescale: ×", round(scale_factor, 4), "]\n", sep = "")
    }
  }
  coords
}

# Image -> Sample lookup
img_sample_map <- data.frame(
  image  = Images(SEURAT_OBJ),
  sample = sapply(Images(SEURAT_OBJ), function(img) {
    coords_raw <- GetTissueCoordinates(SEURAT_OBJ, image = img)
    barcodes <- if ("cell" %in% colnames(coords_raw)) coords_raw$cell else rownames(coords_raw)
    unique(SEURAT_OBJ$orig.ident[colnames(SEURAT_OBJ) %in% barcodes])[1]
  }),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Spot_Label
SEURAT_OBJ$Spot_Label <- ifelse(
  !is.na(SEURAT_OBJ$M2_Coeff) & SEURAT_OBJ$M2_Coeff > 0 & SEURAT_OBJ$M2_AdjP < 0.05,
  "High-coupling", "Reference"
)
SEURAT_OBJ$Spot_Label[is.na(SEURAT_OBJ$M2_Coeff)] <- "NA"
SEURAT_OBJ$Spot_Label <- factor(SEURAT_OBJ$Spot_Label,
                                levels = c("High-coupling", "Reference", "NA"))

# Palette
m2_palette    <- function(n = 100) viridis::rocket(n, begin = 0.15, end = 0.95, direction = -1)
fib_palette   <- function(n = 100) viridis::mako  (n, begin = 0.15, end = 0.95, direction = -1)
gwr_diverging <- c("#08519C", "#4292C6", "#9ECAE1",
                   "#FFEDA0",
                   "#FEB24C", "#FD8D3C", "#E31A1C")
hc_cols <- c("High-coupling" = "#D55E00",
             "Reference"     = "#666666",
             "NA"            = "#DDDDDD")

# H&E layer
get_HE_layer <- function(obj, img_name, alpha = HE_ALPHA) {
  img_array <- obj@images[[img_name]]@image
  if (is.null(img_array)) return(NULL)
  if (length(dim(img_array)) == 3 && dim(img_array)[3] == 3) {
    alpha_layer <- array(alpha, dim = c(dim(img_array)[1], dim(img_array)[2], 1))
    img_array  <- abind::abind(img_array, alpha_layer, along = 3)
  }
  list(grob = grid::rasterGrob(img_array, interpolate = TRUE),
       height = dim(img_array)[1], width = dim(img_array)[2])
}

# Panel function 
make_panel <- function(coords_s, HE_info, feature, palette_fn, lim,
                       title, oob_method = scales::squish) {
  p <- ggplot(coords_s,
              aes(x = imagecol, y = -imagerow, color = .data[[feature]]))
  if (!is.null(HE_info)) {
    p <- p + annotation_custom(HE_info$grob,
                               xmin = 0, xmax = HE_info$width,
                               ymin = -HE_info$height, ymax = 0)
  }
  p +
    geom_point(size = DOT_SIZE, alpha = 0.9) +
    scale_color_gradientn(colors = palette_fn, limits = lim,
                          oob = oob_method, na.value = "#DDDDDD") +
    labs(title = title, color = NULL) +       # color = NULL
    coord_fixed() + theme_void() +
    theme(plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
          plot.title       = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 12),
          legend.position  = "right",
          legend.text      = element_text(size = 9),
          legend.key.height= unit(0.5, "cm"))
}

# Main loop
cat("============================================================\n")
cat("KPMP DKD cohort - Processing", length(valid_samples), "samples\n")
cat("============================================================\n")

for (target_sample in valid_samples) {
  cat("\nGenerating:", target_sample, "\n")
  img <- img_sample_map$image[img_sample_map$sample == target_sample]
  if (length(img) == 0) { cat("  No image - skipping\n"); next }
  img <- img[1]
  
  HE_info <- get_HE_layer(SEURAT_OBJ, img, alpha = HE_ALPHA)
  
  coords_s <- get_coords_std(SEURAT_OBJ, img) %>%
    left_join(SEURAT_OBJ@meta.data %>%
                rownames_to_column("Barcode") %>%
                dplyr::select(Barcode, M2Mac_fraction, Fibrosis_Score,
                              M2_Coeff, Spot_Label),
              by = "Barcode")
  
  n_hc <- sum(coords_s$Spot_Label == "High-coupling", na.rm = TRUE)
  cat("  Spots:", nrow(coords_s), "  HC spots:", n_hc, "\n")
  
  # Color-scale range
  m2_vals <- coords_s$M2Mac_fraction[!is.na(coords_s$M2Mac_fraction)]
  m2_lim_hi <- if (length(m2_vals) > 0) quantile(m2_vals, 0.90) else 1
  if (m2_lim_hi <= 0) m2_lim_hi <- max(m2_vals, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (m2_lim_hi <= 0) m2_lim_hi <- 1e-6
  
  fib_vals   <- coords_s$Fibrosis_Score[!is.na(coords_s$Fibrosis_Score)]
  fib_lim_lo <- quantile(fib_vals, 0.10)
  fib_lim_hi <- quantile(fib_vals, 0.90)
  
  # Four panels
  pA <- make_panel(coords_s, HE_info, "M2Mac_fraction",
                   m2_palette(100), c(0, m2_lim_hi),
                   title = "M2 macrophage score")
  
  pB <- make_panel(coords_s, HE_info, "Fibrosis_Score",
                   fib_palette(100), c(fib_lim_lo, fib_lim_hi),
                   title = "Fibrosis score")
  
  pC <- make_panel(coords_s, HE_info, "M2_Coeff",
                   gwr_diverging, c(-GWR_COEF_CAP, GWR_COEF_CAP),
                   title = "GWR coefficient")
  
  coords_ordered <- coords_s %>% arrange(Spot_Label == "High-coupling")
  pD <- ggplot(coords_ordered,
               aes(x = imagecol, y = -imagerow, color = Spot_Label))
  if (!is.null(HE_info)) {
    pD <- pD + annotation_custom(HE_info$grob,
                                  xmin = 0, xmax = HE_info$width,
                                  ymin = -HE_info$height, ymax = 0)
  }
  pD <- pD +
    geom_point(size = DOT_SIZE, alpha = 0.95) +
    scale_color_manual(values = hc_cols, na.value = "#DDDDDD", drop = FALSE) +
    labs(title = "High-coupling spots", color = NULL) +
    coord_fixed() + theme_void() +
    theme(plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
          plot.title       = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 12),
          legend.position  = "right",
          legend.text      = element_text(size = 9))
  
  tissue_aspect <- diff(range(coords_s$imagerow, na.rm = TRUE)) /
                   diff(range(coords_s$imagecol, na.rm = TRUE))
  cat(sprintf("  Tissue aspect (H/W): %.2f\n", tissue_aspect))
  
  if (tissue_aspect > ASPECT_THRESHOLD) {
    cat("  -> Layout: 1x4 (tall tissue)\n")
    fig_map <- pA / pB / pC / pD +
      plot_annotation(title = target_sample,
                      theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5,
                                                              face = "bold", size = 16))) &
      theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 8, r = 15, b = 8, l = 15, unit = "pt"))
    fig_w <- 8;  fig_h <- 24
  } else {
    cat("  -> Layout: 2x2 (default)\n")
    fig_map <- (pA | pB) / (pC | pD) +
      plot_annotation(title = target_sample,
                      theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5,
                                                              face = "bold", size = 16))) &
      theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 25, b = 10, l = 25, unit = "pt"))
    fig_w <- 14; fig_h <- 15
  }
  
  print(fig_map)
  
  # ---------- save ----------
  file_base <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("Spatial_4panel_", target_sample, "_v9"))
  ggsave(paste0(file_base, ".pdf"), fig_map,
         width = fig_w, height = fig_h, units = "in", device = cairo_pdf)
  ggsave(paste0(file_base, ".png"), fig_map,
         width = fig_w, height = fig_h, units = "in", dpi = 600)
  cat("  ✓ Saved:", file_base, sprintf(" (%dx%d in)\n", fig_w, fig_h))
}

cat("\nDone. KPMP DKD cohort.\n")
cat("Saved in:", out_dir, "\n")
```
